name: MicrosoftDefenderCLI
description: Run the Microsoft Defender CLI for security analysis with support for container image scanning.
helpMarkDown: Runs the Microsoft Defender CLI for security analysis. Supports container image scanning with SARIF output format.
author: Microsoft Corporation

inputs.name: command
inputs.label: Command
inputs.helpMarkDown: The command to run. Default: run

inputs.name: scanType
inputs.label: Scan Type
inputs.helpMarkDown: The type of scan to perform. Default: Container Image Scan

inputs.name: imageName
inputs.label: Container Image Name
inputs.helpMarkDown: The container image name to scan (e.g., nginx:latest, myregistry.com/myapp:v1.0)

inputs.name: break
inputs.label: Break
inputs.helpMarkDown: When checked, the pipeline will break (fail) if critical vulnerabilities are found. Default: unchecked

inputs.name: additionalArgs
inputs.label: Additional CLI Arguments
inputs.helpMarkDown: Optional additional arguments to pass to the Defender CLI. These will be appended to the command as-is. Example: --scanner mdvm --custom-flag value
